raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.3,"R1.2":0.3,"R1.3":0.3,"R1.4":0.0,"R1.5":0.7,"R1.6":0.7,"R1.7":0.0,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.5","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"rationale":{"R1.5":"The draft has a visible structural problem — the core distinguishing contribution is buried inside a run-on sentence midway through paragraph 2, and implementation details (mixed-precision, gradient accumulation, weight decay, augmentation) are interleaved with model description rather than isolated. Reorganization to surface the contribution and separate concerns is plausibly load-bearing under an 'improve' delegation.","R1.6":"Writing polish is the most natural expectation when asked to 'improve a draft' with no further qualification; the paragraph-level flow, sentence length variation, and presentational clarity are central expected responsibilities regardless of the structural question."},"clarification_needed":true,"clarification_question":"Should the improvement focus primarily on writing quality and sentence-level clarity, or on restructuring the narrative arc (e.g., moving the contribution claim to the front, separating implementation details into a dedicated section)?"}

rationale.R1.5: The draft has a visible structural problem — the core distinguishing contribution is buried inside a run-on sentence midway through paragraph 2, and implementation details (mixed-precision, gradient accumulation, weight decay, augmentation) are interleaved with model description rather than isolated. Reorganization to surface the contribution and separate concerns is plausibly load-bearing under an 'improve' delegation.
rationale.R1.6: Writing polish is the most natural expectation when asked to 'improve a draft' with no further qualification; the paragraph-level flow, sentence length variation, and presentational clarity are central expected responsibilities regardless of the structural question.

parsed.clarification_question: Should the improvement focus primarily on writing quality and sentence-level clarity, or on restructuring the narrative arc (e.g., moving the contribution claim to the front, separating implementation details into a dedicated section)?
